title: Ex Deorum Expandere
description: Fork of "Haven Ex Deorum Expansion", updated, new tier(s?) & more
body:
This project is a fork of: "[Haven Ex Deorum Expansion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/haven-ex-deorum-expansion)" that add content to "[Ex Deorum](https://modrinth.com/mod/ex-deorum)" **/!\ Replacing "Haven Ex Deorum Expansion" with this mod will delete your blocks and require deleting old config files /!\ **
# As of 1.0.0:
- Updated dependencies (Ex Deorum, Jade, JEI)
- Updated to Forge (47.4.0)
- Cleaned up some code snippets
- Changed some textures (Machines have brighter colors)
- Fixed particle issue when machines are broken

# Planned/In Progress:
- Added copper tier for machines (under iron)
- Reworked machine speed calculation
- Tooltip for machine process speed
- Fixed an issue where crafts with JEI were not displayed in the machine
- Updated the way config files (and descriptions) are handled

# Ideas (may not be added):
- New tiers, e.g., Nether Star? 
- New tiers compatible with other mods (enderium for thermal for example)
